narrative:
Auburn Twp township has 5,277 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
